victim.value: Tina, Mark's wife who cheated on him five weeks after marriage
victim.quote: Cheated on me with a black dude five weeks after we got married. I found her at a sleazy motel, getting f

culprit_and_motive.value: Mark seeking revenge against his cheating wife Tina with help from supernatural entity Edward
culprit_and_motive.quote: I'm very angry and I want to make her pay. So are you going to help me or not?

red_herring.value: Early misdirection toward random crime - beautiful woman in alley suggests sexual violence, but actual plot involves supernatural revenge deal
red_herring.quote: Women this beautiful rarely came to alleys like this, unless, of course, they were freshly caught whores

social_world.value: Working class resentment and anti-establishment sentiment - protagonist despises conventional morality and 'righteous path' followers
social_world.quote: Didn't they see there was no point in what they called 'following the righteous path'?

investigator_wound.value: Mark's betrayal trauma from wife's infidelity drives him to supernatural revenge - wounded by marital betrayal after five weeks
investigator_wound.quote: Cheated on me with a black dude five weeks after we got married. I found her at a sleazy motel
